subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath appeared at the Most Great Horizon and the Eye of God gazeth upon it. Blessed are the souls who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت در منظر اکبر حاضر و بصر الله بان ناظر طوبی از برای نفوسی که بحجبات
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
